creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-11-09 23:25:09 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    print                Makefile 
  Added files:
    print/rubygem-prawn  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Prawn is a new pure Ruby PDF generation library,
  with the long term goal of providing a suitable
  replacement for PDF::Writer. It is being developed
  under the auspices of the Ruby Mendicant project
  with copious help from a number of mighty fine
  contributors.
  
  WWW: http://rubyforge.org/projects/prawn/
  
  PR:             ports/128455
  Submitted by:   wenheping at gmail.com
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.461     +1 -0      ports/print/Makefile
  1.1       +27 -0     ports/print/rubygem-prawn/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/print/rubygem-prawn/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +8 -0      ports/print/rubygem-prawn/pkg-descr (new)
